transcript:
CALLER: Hello, main receipt maangna chahta hoon apne treatment ki. Mujhe income tax ke liye chahiye.
AGENT: Bilkul, main help kar sakta hoon. Aapka naam aur registered mobile number bataiye.
CALLER: Main Nandkumar Joshi. Number 9876001122.
AGENT: Mr. Joshi, main aapka record dekh raha hoon. Aapne is financial year mein total ₹31,400 ki services li hain. Consolidated receipt chahiye ya itemized?
CALLER: Itemized better hogi, income tax ke liye.
AGENT: Theek hai. Main aapki registered email par itemized receipt bhej deta hoon — aath se dus minute mein aa jaayegi. Kya email sahi hai jo record mein hai?
CALLER: Haan wahi theek hai.
AGENT: Done. Agar receipt 15 minute mein na aaye toh dobara call karein. Koi aur help?
CALLER: Nahin, bas itna hi. Shukriya.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai, Mr. Joshi!
